title: effect-mode project effects
description: Project-local dynamic context effects for the pi effect-mode package.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor/LSP hints.

effects.description: Effects are executed sequentially in array order when stale, then rendered into the model context.

id.description: Unique memorable effect id. Duplicate ids are invalid, even for disabled effects.

description.description: Optional human/model-readable explanation of what the effect captures.

command.description: Shell command executed with the platform shell and inherited pi environment.

cwd.description: Working directory. Use 'project' for pi's cwd, or a relative path within the project root. Absolute and escaping paths are rejected.

ttlMs.description: Successful-result cache TTL in milliseconds. 0 means execute on every LLM call.

errorTtlMs.description: Failed-result cache TTL in milliseconds. 0 means retry failures on every LLM call.

maxBytes.description: Combined stdout/stderr render budget per effect. Tail truncation is used when output is too large.

enabled.description: Disabled effects are omitted from model context and shown as disabled in /effects.

includeMetadata.description: Whether to include effect-mode execution metadata (status, command, cwd, age, duration, ttl) in model context. /effects always shows metadata.

options.description: Per-effect script options passed only via PI_EFFECT_OPTIONS_JSON. Values must be scalar: string, number, boolean, or null.
